reference: I was bitten by my own dog. It is not a deep bite at all. However, he has nipped at me a couple of times in the past, and each time I have had to get antibiotics because it got infected. This bite seems to be getting infected. My skin is extremely sensitive. I have some Bactrim Double Strength left from an ear infection, and I am wondering if I can take that for this skin infection?
text: I was bitten by my own dog. It is not a deep bite at all. However, he has bitten me a couple of times in the past, and each time I have had to get antibiotics because it got infected. This bite seems to be getting infected. My skin is extremely sensitive. I have some baclofen double strength left from an ear infection, and I am wondering if I can take that for this skin infection.
